videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição How long can I stay hidden in my mom 's house without her knowing? For that, I waited for my mom to leave for work and set up. 5 secret hiding spots in her house. Like in the bedroom, the kitchen, and even on the roof. And I did all this to uncover a secret she 's hiding. That I have a brother that I ... Never met. Right now, my mom is n't home. And, as you all know, I do in fact have a brother, Guilherme, who has already recorded. Several videos on the channel. But I started to get really suspicious that I have a third brother. After seeing some photos. Basically, I asked my mom for some old photos to record a video for the channel, but while digging through the oldest photos of all, I noticed something strange. Simply flipping through the pages, they just look like old photos with family and friends. But when we move on to the last pages and think the album is completely finished, if we flip a few more pages ahead, look, we get to kind of a secret section. Some really strange photos that I had never seen before. This photo here, taken at Chr ... Christmas 2006. In the photo, it 's me, my brother, and my mom. I really liked the Ferrari I got for Christmas, but pay close attention. In my mom 's hand, there 's another present, which was n't mine and was n't my brother 's. And if we look closely, there 's a note for 'Roberto.' I do n't have any relatives named Roberto, especially not at an intimate Christmas Eve. But it does n't stop there. There 's also this photo of my mom helping us with our homework, and if you look closely, in her hand, there 's something suspicious. A notebook belonging to Roberto. To make this doubt even stronger—whether or not I have a brother my mom never told me about—I even found this photo of a family picnic we were having. I was already a bit older and I remember this day very well. It was me, my mom, and my brother. But I remember that my mom kept leaving with some food and coming back with nothing. As if she were taking food to someone in secret. And, in the suspicious photo we found in this album, you can see a child. Watching everything from afar in the tree. Is this Roberto? The brother I never knew about that my mom hid for years ... I 'm here. Simba, I need you to stay right here in this spot and wait for me to return, so please do not move until I come back to get you. My love, man, unbelievable. I ca n't believe my mom got home early. Today. She was n't supposed to get here at this time. As you can see, this is our main secret room. But I 'll show it to you guys calmly later. I have to keep a really close eye on my mom. Wow, I ca n't believe I still have a meeting right now. My mom got home early because she has to work and do some meetings. On one hand, that 's a good thing. But on the other hand, it 's a really bad thing. Because when my mom gets into these meetings, she spends hours and hours and hours in front of the computer, working. And I was n't wrong. My mom sat down in front of the computer and did n't leave it for anything. And there was no sign of her giving any hint about my supposed unknown brother. Since my mom ended up getting home earlier, I ended up showing you all the hiding spots. Some of them, in fact, are n't even finished yet. But now it does n't matter anymore. I ca n't get anything else from the secret rooms unless my mom leaves again. But at least in this little room, I have everything I need. There are some things to eat, some toys, some stuff from the channel to pass the time. And here in this room, there 's even an oral hygiene kit, with the channel 's toothbrushes and mouthwash too. Since I figured my mom would sleep in her room, in this secret room I grabbed some pillows and a blanket so I could spend the night and see if I can get some pizza from this guy, Roberto. Wow, guys, I thought my mom 's inertia would never end. Now, since she said she 's going to take a shower, maybe that 's my cue to change hiding spots. If I go down quickly, I can get to the kitchen, which is probably the next place she 'll go. Here, on this lower floor, I picked out two places to make secret hiding spots. One of them is this giant beanbag. I can get inside and watch her through these holes. This box here is a new trash can she bought. Inside it, I made a secret room. Let me get inside here quickly, before my mom gets out of the shower. Believe it or not, this is one of my most spacious secret rooms. Like the others, there are pillows, a blanket, and since this is also the secret kitchen, I left some snacks from the channel here so I can eat while she eats. Actually, in a bit, I think I 'm going to eat some awesome chips. Thanks for the door. Wow, guys, what a scare. It looks like my mom has already gone into the kitchen and really needs to be doing something in order to eat. But it 's a good thing I made this secret hideout, from here I can hear almost everything she says. Definitely, I 'm not able to come to any conclusion. My mom is really just eating, messing around on her phone, not saying anything important. All I can do now is wait. It looks like my mom is getting ready to go upstairs. Since she 's left the kitchen, I think the coast is clear for me to get out. I just have to find a way back to my room. Mainly because if she says anything in her room, during the night, to someone, I need to know. I 've only one chance to do this, when she goes into the bathroom to brush her teeth. Looks like the coast is clear, it seems she went to her room. I wo n't have another chance, I wo n't have another chance to go back and hide trash. Good thing I managed to get back to this place. My mom is already getting things ready to go to bed. Is she going to leave the room? No. She 's just turning off the lights. There 's no point in spying while she 's sleeping, because we wo n't get any information just watching her sleep. All that 's left for me now is to enjoy the rest of my night in my secret room. The worst part is, I 'm not even that sleepy yet and there 's not much for me to do. I think I can kill some time coloring here. The Zé Lomonsters coloring book, there are some packs of markers here, but that 's it, guys. I think for now I 'll just wait until tomorrow, and if there 's any kind of update during the night, I 'll be sure to get back to you. Wow, man. What time is it? It 's six fifty in the morning, man.
